title: DOVE ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: DOVE ADVOCACY CENTER DOVE ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy, protective order assistance, emergency shelter, safety planning, court and medical accompaniment, referrals, support groups, and a crisis line. 726 N 1st Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault, stalking, dating violence, human trafficking, and elder abuse. Also serves individulas with disabilities who are victims of abuse. Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Crisis line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 947-2449 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 947-2498 Main phone Business Line (541) 947-2145 Alternate Business Line (541) 947-2449 Crisis Line 24 / 7 Main phone (541) 947-2449 Crisis Line Administration (541) 947-2498 Toll-free (800) 338-7590 Crisis Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lake County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30pm - 4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on N 1st Street between G and H Streets Services: Advocacy * Domestic Violence Issues Advocacy * Human Trafficking Issues Crime Victim Accompaniment Services Crime Victim Support Groups Dating Abuse Hotlines Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Shelters Domestic Violence Support Groups Human Trafficking Hotlines Human Trafficking Shelters Protective/Restraining Orders Sexual Assault Hotlines Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Transportation for Endangered People If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOVE ADVOCACY CENTER
